title: A2UI catalogue index
description: The deterministic catalog selection menu — read whenToUse to pick extension catalogs for a need; the base catalog is always resolved.

catalogs.title: A2UI base atoms
catalogs.whenToUse: The standard catalog — structure, text, data display, inputs, actions and the wired state connectors. ALWAYS resolved; every surface uses it.

atoms.description: single collapsible section with toggle by clicking its header, using only CSS.
full-width status alert strip optional action.

catalogs.title: Aviation, ATC & geo
catalogs.whenToUse: Use for air-traffic / geospatial surfaces — radar, ADS-B feeds, airspace maps, isometric fleet and 3-D geo views.

atoms.description: OpenSky Network ADS-B live flight positions for a bounding box

animated particle plexus with proximity lines and mouse repulsion
animated atmospheric contour wave field

isometric 3D canvas of A321neo takeoff from LFBO — animated roll, rotation, gear-up, climb; HUD with airline/runway
dark-theme interactive Mercator map with node pins and links
interactive spinning 3-D globe (wire or earth)
rotating 3D isometric mesh with height-colour mapping and drag-rotate
live METAR weather feed — parsed wind, temp, QNH for an ICAO station
animated orbit diagram with satellite nodes
SVG radar/spider chart of skill competency levels — optional before/after growth overlay
